query:
SELECT b.id as bundle_id, b.name as bundle_name, c.id as course_id, c.title as course_title 
FROM course_bundles b, courses c 
WHERE (b.name = 'Biblical Foundations' AND c.title IN ('Old Testament Survey', 'New Testament Survey', 'Biblical Hermeneutics'))
   OR (b.name = 'Spiritual Warfare & Deliverance' AND c.title IN ('Deliverance Ministry', 'Understanding Prophecy', 'Prayer and Intercession'))
   OR (b.name = 'Ministry Leadership Track' AND c.title IN ('The Fivefold Ministry', 'Christian Leadership', 'Church Administration'))
ORDER BY b.id, c.id;

FROM course_bundles b, courses c 
WHERE (b.name = 'Biblical Foundations' AND c.title IN ('Old Testament Survey', 'New Testament Survey', 'Biblical Hermeneutics'))
   OR (b.name = 'Spiritual Warfare & Deliverance' AND c.title IN ('Deliverance Ministry', 'Understanding Prophecy', 'Prayer and Intercession'))
   OR (b.name = 'Ministry Leadership Track' AND c.title IN ('The Fivefold Ministry', 'Christian Leadership', 'Church Administration'))
ORDER BY b.id, c.id;
